LINK Price Analysis: Chainlink Expects Huge Move Upon Breaking Symmetrical Triangle
articles.description: Chainlink is down 2% over the past 24 hours, forming a huge symmetrical triangle. Against Bitcoin, LINK found support at 0.0006 BTC last Friday and since then, pushed higher.

articles.title: Stellar Lumens (XLM) Team Releases Its 2021 Roadmap
articles.description: Grow, Grow, Grow The Stellar Lumens (XLM) team published its 2021 roadmap today, setting out its vision for the coming year and beyond. The prevailing theme in the much anticipated roadmap is growth.
